summary: Recent updates to the Media Source Extensions (MSE) in Firefox introduced the use of MOZ_LOG_FMT for better logging. This change enhances the way the browser handles media streams, allowing developers to create more detailed and readable logs when debugging issues related to media playback. Improved logging is essential for ensuring a smooth user experience when streaming content, as it helps identify and resolve potential problems effectively, thus supporting formats like adaptive bitrate streaming. Overall, these adjustments aim to make the media-playing experience more reliable and efficient for users.
